criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence to enhance user experience, such as through personalized recommendations, chatbots, or content moderation.
criteria.sources: App feature descriptions, user reviews, developer documentation.

criteria.name: User Base Size
criteria.description: The number of active users on the platform, indicating its popularity and potential for social connections.
criteria.sources: App store statistics, company reports, market analysis.

criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: The level of user activity and interaction within the app, such as daily active users, session length, and frequency of use.
criteria.sources: Analytics reports, user surveys, app usage statistics.

criteria.name: Privacy and Security
criteria.description: The measures implemented by the app to protect user data and ensure secure interactions.
criteria.sources: Privacy policies, security audits, user feedback.

criteria.name: Innovative Features
criteria.description: The presence of unique or cutting-edge functionalities that distinguish the app from competitors.
criteria.sources: App feature lists, industry reviews, user testimonials.
